name: PM Knowledge Base
description: Enterprise PM knowledge foundation. Indexes your organization's licensed standards library (PMBOK, PRINCE2, SAFe, internal docs) into local vector storage for semantic retrieval. Ships with a built-in PMI ontology covering PMBOK process groups, knowledge areas, risk categories, stakeholder engagement levels, and EVM formulas.

knowledgeBasePath.description: Absolute path to directory containing PDFs and docs to index. Set this to your organization's licensed standards library.

chunkSize.description: Characters per chunk for document splitting (default: 800)

chunkOverlap.description: Characters of overlap between adjacent chunks (default: 150)

reindexOnStart.description: Force re-index all documents on every startup (default: false — uses mtime-based incremental indexing)
